title: Vanity: Create
description: Adds the removed blazing, gilded quartz, and shadow steel tools from Create as a Vanity pack
body:
# Vanity: Create

A pack for [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core) that adds the blazing, gilded quartz, and shadow steel tools that were removed from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).

When installed alongside Vanity: Core, Blazing, Gilded Quartz, and Shadow Steel Designs becomes available to the player in the creative inventory and through villager trading.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PpvwNllk/images/a9be0227dd53a81254345216b5d0476ef62cb252.png)
